description_long: This is a large, cylindrical metal barrel with a slightly weathered beige exterior, showing patches of rust and wear. The barrel features two prominent horizontal reinforcement bands, one near the top and one near the bottom, which add structural integrity. On one side, there is a large yellow warning label with a radiation symbol and the word 'RADIOACTIVE', indicating hazardous contents. A small white cap or bung is visible on the top surface, likely for filling or emptying the barrel. There are some green stains or marks on the side, possibly from leakage or contact with other materials. The overall appearance suggests it is used for storing or transporting dangerous industrial materials, most likely in an outdoor or industrial setting.
description: A weathered beige metal barrel with rust patches, a radioactive warning label, and visible reinforcement bands. It has a small top cap and green stains on the side.
description_view_0: The barrel is seen from an angle showing the top rim and a small white cap, with rust stains visible but no label.
description_view_1: This view highlights the radioactive warning label and green stain, making it the most informative side.
description_view_2: The side of the barrel is shown with some green stains and no visible label, emphasizing the plain metal surface.
description_view_3: The back of the barrel is visible, showing a large dent and rust patches, with no label or cap in view.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: metal hoops at top and bottom
attribute_labeling_or_markings: radioactive warning label with symbol and text
